ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person using a white cane, walking towards the right.  The right arm will swing naturally in a walking motion, while the left arm maintains a more stable position to aid in balance.  The cane will be implied by the positioning of the left arm and hand.  I will use subtle changes in joint angles to create a smooth and realistic walking animation. The key is to create a sense of movement and balance, reflecting the careful steps of someone using a cane.

frames.beat: left arm steady, right arm swings forward for a step
right arm swings back, propelling forward motion
left arm steady, right arm swings forward again
